entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: A legume crop used to study the toxic effects of salinity induced by farmyard manure.

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: The presence of excess salts in the growth medium, measured by electrical conductivity.

entities.name: FARMYARD MANURE
entities.description: An organic amendment that increased the salt content of the potting mixture.

entities.name: GREENHOUSE
entities.description: The environment where the potted plant experiment was conducted.

entities.name: MORTALITY
entities.description: The death of plants occurring 2-3 weeks after germination due to medium toxicity.

entities.name: ELECTRICAL CONDUCTIVITY
entities.description: The technique used to analyze the salt content of soil, FYM, and their mixtures.

entities.name: SOIL
entities.description: A primary component of the potting medium mixed with FYM and sand.

entities.name: SAND
entities.description: A component of the potting medium used in a 6:3:1 ratio with soil and FYM.
